summary: Iteration 43: Smart Review Suggestions feature testing complete. All 59 backend tests passed (40 existing + 19 new Smart Suggestions tests). All frontend UI tests passed. The Smart Suggestions feature correctly analyzes families and recommends bulk approval candidates with safety checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Suggestions feature fully working. GET /api/admin/review/smart-suggestions returns summary with fully_eligible/partially_eligible/ineligible counts and suggestions array. Approve buttons trigger POST /api/admin/review/bulk-approve with slugs from eligible_slugs. UI shows summary cards, suggestion list with scores, expanded view with analysis reasoning. All existing review endpoints still work.

smart_suggestions_api.GET /api/admin/review/smart-suggestions: PASS - Returns summary with fully_eligible, partially_eligible, ineligible counts and suggestions array
smart_suggestions_api.Summary structure: PASS - Contains total_families_analyzed, fully_eligible, partially_eligible, ineligible, total_products_clearable
smart_suggestions_api.Suggestion structure: PASS - Contains family, division, brand, family_size, smart_approve_eligible, partially_eligible, smart_approve_score, smart_approve_reason, smart_approve_exclusion_reasons, avg_confidence, min_confidence, max_confidence, eligible_count, eligible_slugs, excluded_count, excluded_slugs, sample_titles, implant_classes
smart_suggestions_api.Eligibility criteria: PASS - Eligible families have same division, same brand, no conflicts, avg conf >= 0.85
smart_suggestions_api.Exclusion reasons: PASS - Valid reasons: mixed_divisions, cross_brand_bundle, has_conflict_flags, ti_vs_ss_material_ambiguity, mixed_materials, mixed_coated_uncoated, avg_confidence_below_threshold, conflict_review_members
smart_suggestions_api.Ti vs SS exclusion: PASS - Families with Ti vs SS material ambiguity are correctly excluded
smart_suggestions_api.Mixed coated exclusion: PASS - Families with mixed coated/uncoated are correctly excluded
smart_suggestions_api.Conflict flags exclusion: PASS - Families with conflict flags are correctly excluded
smart_suggestions_api.Cross-brand exclusion: PASS - Families with cross-brand bundles are correctly excluded
smart_suggestions_api.Sorting: PASS - Eligible families first, then by score descending
smart_suggestions_api.min_family_size filter: PASS - Filters families by minimum size

smart_suggestions_ui.Smart Suggestions button: PASS - Green button in top right, clickable
smart_suggestions_ui.Smart Suggestions panel: PASS - Loads with summary cards and suggestion list
smart_suggestions_ui.Summary cards: PASS - Shows Safe to Approve (8), Partially Eligible (8), Not Eligible (29), Products Clearable (38)
smart_suggestions_ui.Suggestion list: PASS - Shows family name, division, brand, product count, avg confidence, implant classes, score badge
smart_suggestions_ui.Approve buttons: PASS - Shows 'Approve N' button for eligible families
smart_suggestions_ui.Expanded view: PASS - Shows analysis reasoning, confidence range, eligible/excluded counts, sample products, exclusion tags
smart_suggestions_ui.Approve flow: PASS - Clicking Approve triggers bulk-approve, shows success toast, updates counts
